Class PaintingVariantKeys

java.lang.Object
io.papermc.paper.registry.keys.PaintingVariantKeys
@NullMarked @GeneratedClass public final class PaintingVariantKeys extends Object
Vanilla keys for RegistryKey.PAINTING_VARIANT.
API Note:
The fields provided here are a direct representation of what is available from the vanilla game source. They may be changed (including removals) on any Minecraft version bump, so cross-version compatibility is not provided on the same level as it is on most of the other API.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static TypedKey<Art> create(Key key)
      Creates a typed key for Art in the registry minecraft:painting_variant.
      Parameters:
      key - the value's key in the registry
      Returns:
      a new typed key
